description: ThousandEyes capabilities for federal, state, and local government agencies, public safety, defense, and civic services

common_requirements.answer: Partial. ThousandEyes maintains SOC 2 Type II certification; FedRAMP authorization requires agency-specific assessment and deployment.
Partial. ThousandEyes provides security controls and documentation supporting FISMA compliance; specific ATO process required per agency.
Partial. ThousandEyes security controls align with StateRAMP requirements; specific state authorization process applies.
Partial. ThousandEyes provides encryption and access controls; CJIS compliance requires specific deployment configuration and security agreements.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors government websites for availability, performance, and user experience from global and domestic locations.

common_requirements.requirement: Online permit and licensing system monitoring
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes monitors permit, licensing, and application portals with transaction testing for submission workflows.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors citizen service portals for availability, response time, and case submission performance.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors FirstNet and public safety networks for availability and performance with priority alerting.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors 911 dispatch system connectivity and network paths with critical alerting capabilities.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors Computer-Aided Dispatch and Records Management Systems for availability and response time.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides end-to-end network visibility across government facilities with WAN and application performance monitoring.

common_requirements.requirement: Cloud migration monitoring (AWS GovCloud, Azure Government)
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes monitors AWS GovCloud and Azure Government deployments with cloud agents and performance validation.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors both legacy and modern systems during migration with comparative performance analysis.
Partial. ThousandEyes can monitor unclassified DoD networks; classified networks require specialized deployment and security clearances.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors secure communication platforms with encryption and access controls for government use.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors VA healthcare applications including VistA, Cerner Millennium, and patient portals.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors public health systems including disease surveillance, immunization registries, and reporting platforms.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors voter registration portals for availability and performance during critical registration periods.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors election results reporting platforms with high-frequency testing during election events.

common_requirements.requirement: Tax filing system monitoring (IRS, state revenue)
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes monitors tax filing platforms for availability and performance during peak filing seasons.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors government payment gateways and fee collection systems for transaction completion.

common_requirements.requirement: ServiceNow for government IT service management
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes integrates with ServiceNow for automated incident management and ITSM workflows.

common_requirements.requirement: Splunk for security and compliance monitoring
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes integrates with Splunk for security monitoring, log correlation, and compliance reporting.
Partial. ThousandEyes monitors website availability and performance but does not validate Section 508 accessibility standards.
Yes. ThousandEyes offers US-based cloud infrastructure and can configure data to remain within US borders for compliance.

common_requirements.requirement: Air-gapped network monitoring for classified systems
common_requirements.answer: Partial. Enterprise Agents can monitor within air-gapped environments but require secure data path for reporting to platform.
Yes. ThousandEyes is available through Cisco's GSA Schedule for federal government procurement.

common_requirements.requirement: US-based support staff with security clearances
common_requirements.answer: Partial. Cisco provides US-based support; clearance requirements depend on specific agency needs and contract terms.
